purpose: Record public source families that can be used to repair the selected-pair local rain calibration gap. This artifact does not contain sampled rainfall values and does not change the scenario rain input.

candidateSources.candidateUse: Gridded precipitation source family for station-near rainfall history or scenario-window precipitation repair.
neededForUse: selected IMERG product family and run type
grid cell id or coordinate extraction method
time period covering the scenario window
raw downloaded file or API response
mapping from precipitation accumulation to model rainRateMmPerHour
candidateSources.claimBoundary: Credible repair source only. No IMERG grid cell or time series is retained in this package.

candidateSources.sourceName: Taiwan CWA Anbu station observation page
candidateSources.candidateUse: Nearby Yangmingshan-area station observation source for local rainfall repair near the representative CHT coordinate.
neededForUse: rainfall field export or official API response
distance and applicability statement relative to the representative coordinate
candidateSources.claimBoundary: Station page candidate only. This package does not retain CWA rainfall values or prove a calibrated rain-rate input.

candidateSources.sourceName: Taiwan CWA Zhuzihu station observation page
candidateSources.candidateUse: Nearby Yangmingshan-area station observation source for local rainfall repair near the representative CHT coordinate.
neededForUse: rainfall field export or official API response
distance and applicability statement relative to the representative coordinate
candidateSources.claimBoundary: Station page candidate only. This package does not retain CWA rainfall values or prove a calibrated rain-rate input.

requiredFields: station id or grid cell id
non-claim text stating that rain calibration is not packet or RF evidence

supports: identifying credible public source families for local rain calibration repair
separating standards-derived rain attenuation from measured or gridded local rain input
doesNotSupport: measured station weather during the scenario
packet, RF, route, or acceptance claims
